name: First Cut Golf Co
about: First Cut Golf Co is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Sterling Heights, MI. It features TrackMan IO simulators across its bays, allowing for golf play regardless of weather conditions. The venue offers a full-service restaurant and bar, combining golf simulation with dining and social experiences. It provides facilities for league play, private events, and casual sessions, supported by extra-large simulator bays and a comfortable lounge seating area.
why_golfers_like_it: Latest TrackMan IO simulators for accurate performance tracking
Extra-large bays providing ample space for comfortable play
Full-service restaurant and bar available for food and drinks
League play options for competitive and social golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with a menu available for snacks and full meals
Full-service bar offering cocktails, beer, and other beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest TrackMan IO simulators with extra-large bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is common practice for simulator venues to provide club rentals if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own full-service restaurant and bar, and does not mention outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time, but typical simulator sessions for 18 holes range from 1 to 2 hours, depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a family-friendly spot to swing, dine, and unwind, making it suitable for kids.
